description: The Bonavota are a 'ndrina (organized crime clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Sant'Onofrio and Stefanaconi, in the province of Vibo Valentia, Calabria. They have members in Piedmont (Turin, Carmagnola, Moncalieri) and Rome, and are allied with the Anello, Lo Bianco, and Mancuso clans. Their activities include extortion, usury, drug trafficking, and money laundering. They were involved in a bloody feud against the Petrolo-Bartolotta clans in the 1980s-1990s.
